calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Alan Horwitz, Esq., for Plaintiff 175 Bluxome Street, LLC.
No appearance by the Defendants Robert McConnell, Robert G. McConnell and Todd Andrews.
09:50 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Octavio Sanchez the property manager was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 175 Bluxome St., #318, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $4,040.85
Attorney's Fees per motion.
Costs of $1+90.30
For the total of $4,231.15
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.
